item.name: Authentic Eggcentric Crown Roast
item.description:
An authentically artful arrangement of several succulent, spice-rubbed racks of lamb, accompanied by a side of steaming soup.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Tenacity Bonus: +4% (Max 10)
VIT Bonus: +5% (Max 12)
Gear Durability Bonus: +3
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
